known_limitations: The JSON schema evaluator intentionally implements only the schema vocabulary used by the visible structured-output contract: object, array, string, number, required, minLength, enum, minimum, maximum, and additionalProperties=false.
The deterministic canned provider is test-only and reads configured outputs from __test/config.
Per-rule budget exhaustion is applied to semantic guard failures. JSON syntax and schema failures still consume the global attempt budget so mixed visible failures can repair as specified.

Failed governed completions return an OpenAI-compatible 200 response with the final exhausted status recorded in the receipt; the response body does not yet expose a first-class structured error object.

mutation_check.mutation: Temporarily changed object schema validation to allow all additional properties.
mutation_check.expected_failure: The extra field then success case failed because the first output completed instead of recording a schema_validation guard.

correctness: Core visible scenarios and additional visible core repairs are covered through public /v1/chat/completions calls and receipt assertions.
Successful governed outputs are parsed and re-emitted as JSON content; exhausted paths leave parsed_output absent and record ordered guard events.
architecture: Structured-output logic is isolated in ElixirIngary.StructuredOutput and only routed for non-streaming chat when structured_output schemas are configured.
The implementation favors the bakeoff contract over a general JSON Schema engine; replacing the local validator with a library would be cleaner if schema coverage expands.
security: No credentials, private endpoints, prompts, provider tokens, or raw secret-bearing content were added.
Receipts store canned provider output only as parsed structured output on success, matching the feature contract.
test_quality: Tests assert public response and receipt behavior, including statuses, attempt counts, schema selection, rule ids, guard types, actions, and parsed output.
The mutation check confirmed the strict additionalProperties behavior can fail for the intended reason.
